{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260320160958CCC7BA08A85EDB126072\"}"},"total":326},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7187170411778687778","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从中详细的了解了中国五千年的发展史！每个时代的崛起和没落！和那些杰出的诗人，政治家军事家科学家他们精彩的人生，这是我听得第一本书！很庆幸选择了这本书！让我对听书和阅读感了兴趣！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1673393592,"group_id":"7100863534447201317","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"选择读喜欢的书，让自己的心静下来！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+qTrA82HExB7EStrX6CrR8=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"92491683131","user_name":"自然姐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"92491683131","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7100863534447201317","book_info":{"abstract":"本书以时间为序，选取了五千年间的重大事件、风云人物、辉煌成就、灿烂文化等内容，力求在真实性、趣味性和启迪性等方面达到一个新的高度，并通过科学的体例与创新的版式，全方位、新视角、多层面地阐释中国历史，精彩扼要地讲述了中国历史演进的基本脉络和文明的发展历程。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9d33c1335e800cd37495ba6b1c838efa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"文若愚编著","author_id":"","book_id":"7100863534447201317","book_name":"中华上下五千年","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0a048","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"168.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":12,\"name\":\"历史\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12\u0026name=历史\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":402,\"name\":\"中国历史\",\"schema\
